allow: Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/events/boxer -H "Authorization: Bearer $\(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"boxer@test.com","password":"boxer123"}')
Bash(python3 -c 'import sys,json; events=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f"OK - {len\(events\)} events, rsvp_status: {[e.get\(\\"rsvp_status\\"\) for e in events]}"\)')

Bash(python3 -c 'import sys,json; events=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f"Event {e[\\"id\\"]}: {e[\\"title\\"]} | invitees: {[\(i[\\"email\\"],i.get\(\\"rsvp_status\\"\)\) for i in e.get\(\\"invitees\\",[]\)]} | counts: {e.get\(\\"rsvp_counts\\"\)}"\) for e in events]')

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/training/coach -H "Authorization: Bearer $\(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"coach@boxing.fr","password":"coach123"}')

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\);let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\);console.log\(r.token?'✅ Login coach OK, rôle: '+r.role:'❌ '+JSON.stringify\(r\)\)}\)")
